item.title: I have successfully defended my PhD theis
item.description: I have successfully defended my PhD thesis on 23rd Jan 2025. Click to check more Thanks to all the board of examaination members, and my lovely teamamtes. The defense is indelible with all your attendance. PhD Defense Celebration
